title: Overly Vulkan
description: Overly Optimized using Vulkan Mod - The best out there!
body:
# Overly Vulkan
Overly Vulkan is a modpack based off of [Overly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ovop) that uses VulkanMod instead of Sodium.

### Lightweight
Based off of [Overly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ovop), a similar modpack targeting Sodium instead, this is extremely lightweight as very little mods come with it.

### NOTE
This is Beta uses only, Overly Vulkan is a expermimental pack that tests viability of Vulkan mod and is not meant to replace [Overly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ovop) yet. This may be used in production environments (common user) if this gives better performance. It may give better performance if Vulkan runs better overall.

Mileage may very between many configs of hardware. Here Be Dragons!
